title: Can't PNR one of the two Icebreaker hardcoded SPI blocks.
code_blocks:
filename = top
pcf_file = io.pcf

build:
	yosys -p "synth_ice40 -json $(filename).json" $(filename).v
	nextpnr-ice40 \
		--up5k \
		--package sg48 \
		--json $(filename).json \
		--pcf $(pcf_file) \
		--asc $(filename).asc
	icepack $(filename).asc $(filename).bin
